title: crotalaria elisabethae
intro: Crotalaria elisabethae, also known as Elizabeth's rattlebox, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Crotalaria elisabethae include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. Crotalaria elisabethae is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, the leaves and flowers are used in herbal preparations such as ointments and salves.
